meaning: n.(苏联科学家设计由地面遥控的) 无人驾驶月面自动车
examples: A laser pulse was sent to Lunokhod 1, and contact was made with the rover for the first time in nearly four decades.
Russian robotic rover Lunokhod 1 landed on the moon in 1970, and traveled about 6 miles (10 km) before vanishing from detection in September 1971.
